items.title_en: Trump tells CNBC he expects U.S. to make ‘great deal’ with Iran
items.title_zh: 特朗普告诉 CNBC，他希望美国与伊朗达成“伟大协议”
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said he expects the U.S. and Israel war against Iran to end soon since it began in late February.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统多次表示，自二月底开始以来，他预计美国和以色列对伊朗的战争将很快结束。

items.title_en: Trump says he'll 'remember' companies that don't seek tariff refund
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示他会“记住”不寻求关税退款的公司
items.desc_en: Trump said he was "not happy with the Supreme Court" for ruling IEEPA tariffs were illegal, and for not allowing the U.S. to keep tariffs already collected.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示，他对最高法院裁定 IEEPA 关税非法且不允许美国保留已征收的关税“不满意”。

items.title_en: Trump says Anthropic is shaping up and a deal is 'possible' for Department of Defense use
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示人择正在形成，并且有可能达成协议供国防部使用
items.desc_en: Trump said his administration had "some very good talks" with Anthropic during a meeting at the White House last week.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示，他的政府上周在白宫举行的一次会议上与 Anthropic 进行了“一些非常好的会谈”。

items.title_en: Trump says 'maybe' government should help struggling Spirit Airlines
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示“也许”政府应该帮助陷入困境的精神航空
items.desc_en: Trump told CNBC's "Squawk Box": "I think I'd love somebody to buy Spirit, as an example."
items.desc_zh: 特朗普告诉 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目：“举个例子，我认为我希望有人购买 Spirit。”

items.title_en: JPMorgan raises S&P 500 target as Mythos model bolsters AI trade
items.title_zh: Mythos 模型支持人工智能贸易，摩根大通上调标准普尔 500 指数目标
items.desc_en: AI-linked stocks struggled during the sell-off sparked by the U.S.-Iran war. But they're doing well now.
items.desc_zh: 在美伊战争引发的抛售期间，人工智能相关股票陷入困境。但他们现在过得很好。

items.title_en: Here's what to expect from Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh's Senate hearing Tuesday

items.desc_en: In a much-anticipated hearing before the Banking Committee, the former Fed governor will face questioning over a variety of subjects

items.desc_en: Allegations of a coup plot first surfaced in October 2025 when an Independence Day parade was cancelled.
items.desc_zh: 关于政变阴谋的指控首次浮出水面是在 2025 年 10 月，当时独立日游行被取消。

items.title_en: Mass trial for 486 alleged MS-13 gang leaders begins in El Salvador
items.title_zh: 萨尔瓦多开始对 486 名 MS-13 帮派头目进行大规模审判
items.desc_en: The group are collectively accused of committing more than 47,000 crimes, including murder.
items.desc_zh: 该团伙被集体指控犯有超过 47,000 起罪行，其中包括谋杀。

items.title_en: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
items.title_zh: 史无前例的裁决发现匈牙利的反 LGBTQ 法律违反了欧盟价值观
items.desc_en: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟最高法院认为，这些改革在多个层面上违反了欧盟价值观，并违反了欧盟条约的基本价值观。

items.title_en: Amazon adding heavy-duty EV trucks from Einride as it spreads bets on freight decarbonization

items.desc_zh: 检察官表示，由于女孩失踪和死亡的特殊情况，他可能面临终身监禁。
